summary: 6 proposals · net −3.1 KB · 1 flagged for review

items.title: prefer_tabs_over_spaces
items.detail: Superseded — the project adopted Prettier, indentation is no longer a human decision.
items.evidence: Last recalled 0 times in 90 days. Contradicted by [[formatting_is_automated]].

items.title: user_prefers_terse_replies
items.detail: Trim the worked example; keep the rule and the why.
items.before: The user prefers terse replies. For example, when they asked about the cache layer, a three-paragraph answer was met with 'too long'. They want bullets, tables, and at most one short example. Avoid restating the question. Avoid closing summaries. Avoid hedging.
items.after: Prefer terse replies: bullets/tables, ≤1 short example, no restating the question, no closing summary, no hedging.

items.title: deploy_notes  ←  deploy_steps + rollback_steps
items.detail: Two notes describe the same release flow from different angles — merge into one, keeping both checklists.
items.before:
deploy_steps.md (build → push → migrate)
rollback_steps.md (tag → reset → restart)
items.after: deploy_notes.md (build → push → migrate · rollback: tag → reset → restart)

items.title: review_checklist
items.detail: This is a recurring workflow, not a one-off project note.

items.title: usefull_links → useful_links
items.detail: Normalize the typo'd filename so [[useful_links]] resolves.

items.title: incident_2024_db
items.detail: Possible duplicate of [[postmortem_db_outage]] — but the dates differ. Needs a human to decide whether these are the same event.
items.evidence: Both reference the primary replica failover, but one is dated March and the other April.
